verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 (Izumo sperm-egg fusion protein 4) is a member of the IZUMO family. Unlike IZUMO1, which is well-characterized as a sperm surface protein essential for egg fusion, IZUMO4 lacks a classical transmembrane domain and is considered primarily an intracellular/secreted protein. It does not have documented stable outer-leaflet plasma membrane localization in somatic cells. Current evidence places it in intracellular compartments or as a secreted factor without stable surface anchoring via its own mechanism. No GPI anchor or TM domain is predicted.
